description: Fibonacci unlock ladder mapping levels to quest class gates

1.description: Base solo quests available from the start

3.description: Guild quests unlock, enabling small-group cooperation

5.description: Community quests unlock, enabling large-group and repair operations

8.description: Temple rite quests unlock, requiring ethical certification

13.description: Storm quests unlock, enabling coalition-based PhiStorm events

21.description: Publish quests unlock, promoting outputs to external registries

34.description: Seeding quests unlock, spawning new atlas branches

55.description: Policy quests unlock, enabling governance modifications

89.description: Migration quests unlock, enabling full atlas version transitions
